From Our Conversation
→Moonlight Doors and Windows offers custom-made windows and doors imported from China at 20–70% below local pricing, with superior quality and performance that has generated strong word-of-mouth from six successful installations.
→The proposed marketing system combines Facebook and Instagram lead generation with a custom mobile CRM to streamline Kane's sales process, from initial contact through consultation booking and closing.
→Starting with conceptual ads focused on key benefits like energy efficiency, the campaign will quickly prove the system's ROI before graduating to professional project photography and video content.
→Kane will present the proposal to his partners early next week with a recommended minimum ad spend of $50 per day to achieve the lead volume necessary for campaign success.
